title: Meritnation Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Meritnation Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Meritnation Ventures Solutions in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Meritnation Ventures Solutions:
Meritnation Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meritnation Ventures Solutions!
